(2) The infrastructure and facilities referred to in subparagraph
(1) shall be suitable for the operation of—
(a) garment manufacturing industries;
(b) packaging materials including corrugated carton box, paper
bags and tape manufacturing industries;
(c) food processing industries;
(d) electric cables manufacturing industries; and
(e) commercial activities.

12th January, 2024 Statutory Instruments 37
FIRST SCHEDULE
(Paragraph 3)
Luano Industrial Park
The parcels of land comprising the Luano Industrial Park are the following:

sections.heading: All that piece of land in extent 3252 square metres more or less being the
sections.text:
remaining extent of stand number 3290 situate in Ndola City in the
Copperbelt Province of Zambia being more particularly delineated and
described in Diagram No. 217/2009 annexed to the Certificate of Title No.
55928 relating to the said piece of land together with all unexhausted
improvements thereon excerpt and reserved all mineral, oils and precious
stones whatsoever upon or under the said piece of land;
